description: Composition:White round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with graphic chest printCare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking 5. Remove promptly 6. Line dry inside-out in shaded 7. Warm iron only 8. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Slim FitIf you are the real deal, the original classic, then by all means let everyone know. Wear this white tee from guerrilla and let everyone know that the one and only unique piece is now in the house. Team these with a pair of jeans or cargoes while hanging out with friends.Models' statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5'11 ft, Shoulders-18"
